verses.latin_vulgate: Paratum cor meum, Deus, paratum cor meum ;  cantabo, et psallam in gloria mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָכ֣וֹן לִבִּ֣י אֱלֹהִ֑ים אָשִׁ֥ירָה וַ֝אֲזַמְּרָ֗ה אַף־כְּבוֹדִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: My heart is ready, O God, my heart is ready: I will sing, and will give praise, with my glory.
verses.finnish_biblia: Psalmi, Davidin veisu. (H108:2) Jumala! minun sydämeni on valmis: minä veisaan ja kiitän, niin myös minun kunniani.
verses.king_james: O God, my heart is fixed; I will sing and give praise, even with my glory.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exsurge, gloria mea ; exsurge, psalterium et cithara ;  exsurgam diluculo.
verses.douay_rheims: Arise, my glory; arise, psaltery and harp: I will arise in the morning early.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nouse, psaltari ja kantele; minä nousen varhain.
verses.king_james: Awake, psaltery and harp: I myself will awake early.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitebor tibi in populis, Domine,  et psallam tibi in nationibus :
verses.douay_rheims: I will praise thee, O Lord, among the people: and I will sing unto thee among the nations.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinua, Herra, minä kiitän kansain seassa: minä veisaan sinulle kiitosta sukukunnissa.
verses.king_james: I will praise thee, O Lord, among the people: and I will sing praises unto thee among the nations.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia magna est super cælos misericordia tua,  et usque ad nubes veritas tua.
verses.douay_rheims: For thy mercy is great above the heavens: and thy truth even unto the clouds.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinun armos on suuri ylitse taivasten, ja sinun totuutes hamaan pilviin asti.
verses.king_james: For thy mercy is great above the heavens: and thy truth reacheth unto the clouds.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exaltare super cælos, Deus,  et super omnem terram gloria tua :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ר֣וּמָה עַל־שָׁמַ֣יִם אֱלֹהִ֑ים וְעַ֖ל כׇּל־הָאָ֣רֶץ כְּבוֹדֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Be thou exalted, O God, above the heavens, and thy glory over all the earth:
verses.finnish_biblia: Korota sinuas, Jumala, taivasten ylitse ja kunnias kaiken maan ylitse,
verses.king_james: Be thou exalted, O God, above the heavens: and thy glory above all the earth;

verses.latin_vulgate: ut liberentur dilecti tui.  Salvum fac dextera tua, et exaudi me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְ֭מַעַן יֵחָלְצ֣וּן יְדִידֶ֑יךָ הוֹשִׁ֖יעָה יְמִֽינְךָ֣ וַעֲנֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: That thy beloved may be delivered. Save with thy right hand and hear me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että sinun rakkaat ystäväs vapaaksi tulisivat; auta oikialla kädelläs, ja kuule minun rukoukseni.
verses.king_james: That thy beloved may be delivered: save with thy right hand, and answer me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus locutus est in sancto suo :  Exsultabo, et dividam Sichimam ;  et convallem tabernaculorum dimetiar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ דִּבֶּ֥ר בְּקׇדְשׁ֗וֹ אֶ֫עְלֹ֥זָה אֲחַלְּקָ֥ה שְׁכֶ֑ם וְעֵ֖מֶק סֻכּ֣וֹת אֲמַדֵּֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: God hath spoken in his holiness. I will rejoice, and I will divide Sichem and I will mete out the vale of tabernacles.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala on puhunut pyhässänsä, siitä minä iloitsen: minä jaan Sikemin, ja mittaan Sukkotin laakson.
verses.king_james: God hath spoken in his holiness; I will rejoice, I will divide Shechem, and mete out the valley of Succoth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Meus est Galaad, et meus est Manasses,  et Ephraim susceptio capitis mei.  Juda rex meus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִ֤י גִלְעָ֨ד ׀ לִ֤י מְנַשֶּׁ֗ה וְ֭אֶפְרַיִם מָע֣וֹז רֹאשִׁ֑י יְ֝הוּדָ֗ה מְחֹקְקִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Galaad is mine: and Manasses is mine and Ephraim the protection of my head. Juda is my king:
verses.finnish_biblia: Gilead on minun, Manasse on myös minun, ja Ephraim on minun pääni väkevyys: Juuda on minun päämieheni;
verses.king_james: Gilead is mine; Manasseh is mine; Ephraim also is the strength of mine head; Judah is my lawgiver;

verses.latin_vulgate: Moab lebes spei meæ :  in Idumæam extendam calceamentum meum ;  mihi alienigenæ amici facti sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מוֹאָ֤ב ׀ סִ֬יר רַחְצִ֗י עַל־אֱ֭דוֹם אַשְׁלִ֣יךְ נַעֲלִ֑י עֲלֵי־פְ֝לֶ֗שֶׁת אֶתְרוֹעָֽע׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moab the pot of my hope. Over Edom I will stretch out my shoe: the aliens are become my friends.
verses.finnish_biblia: Moab on minun pesinastiani, minä venytän kenkäni Edomin päälle: Philistealaisten ylitse minä iloitsen.
verses.king_james: Moab is my washpot; over Edom will I cast out my shoe; over Philistia will I triumph.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis deducet me in civitatem munitam ?  quis deducet me usque in Idumæam ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֣י יֹ֭בִלֵנִי עִ֣יר מִבְצָ֑ר מִ֖י נָחַ֣נִי עַד־אֱדֽוֹם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who will bring me into the strong city? who will lead me into Edom?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuka vie minua vahvaan kaupunkiin? kuka vie minua Edomiin?
verses.king_james: Who will bring me into the strong city? who will lead me into Edom?

verses.latin_vulgate: nonne tu, Deus, qui repulisti nos ?  et non exibis, Deus, in virtutibus nostris ?
verses.douay_rheims: Wilt not thou, O God, who hast cast us off ? and wilt not thou, O God, go forth with our armies?
verses.finnish_biblia: Etkös sinä, Jumala, joka meitä heittänyt olet pois? Ja etkös mene ulos, Jumala, meidän sotaväkemme kanssa?
verses.king_james: Wilt not thou, O God, who hast cast us off? and wilt not thou, O God, go forth with our hosts?

verses.latin_vulgate: Da nobis auxilium de tribulatione,  quia vana salus hominis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָבָה־לָּ֣נוּ עֶזְרָ֣ת מִצָּ֑ר וְ֝שָׁ֗וְא תְּשׁוּעַ֥ת אָדָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: O grant us help from trouble: for vain is the help of man.
verses.finnish_biblia: Saata meille apua tuskissamme; sillä ihmisten apu on turha.
verses.king_james: Give us help from trouble: for vain is the help of man.

verses.latin_vulgate: In Deo faciemus virtutem ;  et ipse ad nihilum deducet inimicos nostros.
verses.douay_rheims: Through God we shall do mightily: and he will bring our enemies to nothing.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumalassa me tahdomme urhoollisia töitä tehdä; ja hän polkee meidän vihollisemme alas.
verses.king_james: Through God we shall do valiantly: for he it is that shall tread down our enemies.
